rationale: Tests whether multi-day sequential inside bars represent institutional equilibrium before explosive trend-defining expansions.
expected_failure_mode: Inside-bar cascades often resolve into random low-liquidity whipsaws.
stop_conditions: simple family fails the named-window or parsimony gates
candidate family remains crowded or redundant
hypothesis cannot be mapped to bounded diagnostics
Profitable signal percentage falls below 38% across a 200-sample run.
